prompt: The payment processing service is silently dropping 15% of transactions. No errors in the logs — the requests just vanish. Customers are being charged but their orders aren't recorded. This is a financial data loss event. Stop the bleeding.

Our ML inference service started returning predictions with 0.0 confidence for all inputs after a model update. The model file loaded successfully but something in the preprocessing pipeline changed. The recommendation engine is useless right now. Fix it.

After a DNS change propagated, half our microservices can't reach the auth service because their DNS caches have the old IP. New requests work but existing connections are broken. Users see intermittent auth failures. Apply the immediate fix.

The database migration that just ran in production added a NOT NULL column without a default value. Every INSERT is now failing. We can't roll back the migration because other migrations have already run on top of it. Fix this forward.

Our event processing pipeline started duplicating events after a Kafka consumer group rebalance. Downstream services are processing every event twice. Financial calculations are being doubled. Apply the minimum fix to stop the duplication.

A certificate renewal happened automatically but the new cert has a different intermediate CA. Half of our clients (older TLS libraries) are rejecting the new cert chain. We need to restore HTTPS connectivity for those clients without breaking the others.

The rate limiter configuration was accidentally set to 1 request per minute instead of 1000 per minute during a config deploy. Every user hits the rate limit after their first API call. The config is in a distributed cache so it can't just be redeployed. Fix it.

Our container orchestrator is crash-looping a critical service because the health check endpoint was moved from /health to /healthz in the last release but the liveness probe wasn't updated. The service starts fine but gets killed every 30 seconds. Patch this.
